$uid..read: auth != null && (auth.uid === $uid || root.child('profiles/' + auth.uid + '/role').val() === 'admin' || auth.token.email === 'admin@thesis.local' || auth.token.email === 'admin@thesis.com')
$uid..write: auth != null && (auth.uid === $uid || root.child('profiles/' + auth.uid + '/role').val() === 'admin' || auth.token.email === 'admin@thesis.local' || auth.token.email === 'admin@thesis.com')
